/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -fPIC -fopenmp -fopenmp -msse -msse2 -msse3 -msse4 -msse4.1 -msse4.2 -O2 -DNDEBUG -fopenmp -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,liblightning__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so -o liblightning__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so CMakeFiles/lightning__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/lightning/srv/detail/loc_cmd__type_support_c.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lightning__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/lightning/srv/detail/save_map__type_support_c.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/chen/sentry_try/sentry_ws/build/lightning:/opt/ros/humble/lib: liblightning__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libsensor_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libnav_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libsensor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libfastcdr.so.1.0.29 /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libnav_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
